requirement_topic.en: ONEE Grid-Connection and 50 Hz Requirements for EV Charging Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: ONEE并网与50 Hz电动汽车充电基础设施要求
requirement_topic.zht: ONEE併網與50 Hz電動汽車充電基礎設施要求

summary.en: Morocco's ONEE operates a 50 Hz grid with a nominal LV distribution voltage of 220 V (single phase) / 400 V (three phase). Public and semi-public EV charging stations connected to the Moroccan grid must meet ONEE technical rules for grid connection, including metering, power quality, harmonic limits, reactive-power management, and protective devices. Fast-charging stations above a certain power threshold may require a dedicated ONEE medium-voltage connection and a substation design approval. ONEE also administers the Moroccan EV charging concession framework under the national EV mobility plan. The applicable installation standard is IEC 61851-1 Mode 3 for AC and Mode 4 for DC fast charging.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥ONEE运营50 Hz电网，标称低压配电电压为220 V（单相）/400 V（三相）。接入摩洛哥电网的公共和半公共EV充电站须满足ONEE并网技术规则，包括计量、电能质量、谐波限值、无功管理和保护装置要求。超过一定功率阈值的快充站可能需要专用的ONEE中压接入和变电站设计批准。ONEE还在国家电动汽车出行计划框架下管理摩洛哥EV充电特许经营框架。适用安装标准为IEC 61851-1 Mode 3（交流）和Mode 4（直流快充）。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥ONEE運營50 Hz電網，標稱低壓配電電壓為220 V（單相）/400 V（三相）。接入摩洛哥電網的公共和半公共EV充電站須滿足ONEE併網技術規則，包括計量、電能質量、諧波限值、無功管理和保護裝置要求。超過一定功率閾值的快充站可能需要專用的ONEE中壓接入和變電站設計批准。ONEE還在國家電動汽車出行計畫框架下管理摩洛哥EV充電特許經營框架。適用安裝標準為IEC 61851-1 Mode 3（交流）和Mode 4（直流快充）。

standards_or_laws: ONEE technical grid-connection rules for EV charging stations
IEC 61851-1 (Mode 3 AC and Mode 4 DC fast charging installation requirements)
IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12 (harmonic current limits for grid connection)
Loi 13-09 / Loi 47-09 frameworks for grid-connected infrastructure

summary.en: Chinese EV charging grid connection follows GB/T 29781 (technical specification for EV charging station), GB/T 18487 series, and local grid company approval processes. Chinese charging stations are designed for 50 Hz / 220 V (AC single phase) or 380 V (AC three phase) — nominally compatible with Moroccan grid voltage, but harmonic and power-quality standards differ. Chinese grid-connection approvals are not transferable to ONEE.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电并网遵循GB/T 29781（电动汽车充电站技术规范）、GB/T 18487系列及地方电网公司审批流程。中国充电站设计适用50 Hz / 220 V（单相交流）或380 V（三相交流），标称上与摩洛哥电网电压兼容，但谐波和电能质量标准有差异。中国并网批准不可转用于ONEE。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電併網遵循GB/T 29781（電動汽車充電站技術規範）、GB/T 18487系列及地方電網公司審批流程。中國充電站設計適用50 Hz / 220 V（單相交流）或380 V（三相交流），標稱上與摩洛哥電網電壓兼容，但諧波和電能質量標準有差異。中國併網批准不可轉用於ONEE。

standards_or_laws: Chinese local grid company grid-connection approval

gap.en: Confirm with ONEE the applicable power threshold above which a medium-voltage grid connection and substation design is required for DC fast chargers. Prepare harmonic and power-quality compliance data per IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12 for the Morocco-spec charger. For AC chargers, confirm Mode 3 RCD type and protective earth configuration against ONEE LV rules. Include OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 back-end communication compliance if required by the Moroccan EV charging concession operator.
gap.zh: 应与ONEE确认直流快充设备适用中压接入和变电站设计要求的功率阈值。应按IEC 61000-3-2/IEC 61000-3-12为摩洛哥规格充电设备准备谐波和电能质量合规数据。对于交流充电设备，应根据ONEE低压规则确认Mode 3 RCD类型和保护接地配置。如摩洛哥EV充电特许经营运营商有要求，还应包括OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1后台通信合规。
gap.zht: 應與ONEE確認直流快充設備適用中壓接入和變電站設計要求的功率閾值。應按IEC 61000-3-2/IEC 61000-3-12為摩洛哥規格充電設備準備諧波和電能質量合規數據。對於交流充電設備，應根據ONEE低壓規則確認Mode 3 RCD類型和保護接地配置。如摩洛哥EV充電特許經營運營商有要求，還應包括OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1後台通訊合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all public and semi-public EV chargers connected to the Moroccan ONEE grid; medium-voltage connection and substation approval mandatory above applicable power threshold
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid-connected EV chargers under local grid company and GB/T 29781; not transferable as ONEE grid approval

source.publisher: Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable (ONEE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moroccan grid voltage (220 V / 400 V, 50 Hz) is nominally compatible with Chinese charger hardware, but power quality, RCD, and metering requirements must be confirmed against ONEE rules. Chinese grid-connection approval is not transferable to ONEE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥电网电压（220 V / 400 V，50 Hz）与中国充电设备硬件标称兼容，但电能质量、RCD和计量要求须与ONEE规则核对确认。中国并网批准不可转用于ONEE。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥電網電壓（220 V / 400 V，50 Hz）與中國充電設備硬體標稱兼容，但電能質量、RCD和計量要求須與ONEE規則核對確認。中國併網批准不可轉用於ONEE。
